metadata.title: Slick 2v1 Hold on Icebox with Calm Aim and Smart Positioning
metadata.description:
Here’s a tight 2v1 on Icebox where patience and precise shots turn the round. Notice how smart movement sets up each kill.
What’s your favorite clutch spot on Icebox?
